news.title: Idea Jam gives students opportunity to collaborate, pitch proposal to enhance campus life
news.summary_en: Winning team pitched plan for another convenient grab-and-go dining option.

news.title: Mizzou researchers turn up the heat on tomatoes
news.summary_en: Show Me Research project focuses on why tomatoes don’t produce the compound that gives peppers their spice.

news.title: Mizzou students work behind the scenes to support nursing simulation center
news.summary_en: Work-study students ensure the Sinclair School of Nursing’s simulation center operates flawlessly, preparing future nurses for life-saving moments.

news.title: Mizzou scholars earn prestigious NSF Graduate Research Fellowships
Mizzou’s College of Veterinary Medicine provides specialized surgery for a smoother recovery
news.summary_en: Through early detection and collaborative expertise, Cooper became a candidate an advanced surgical option not widely available in the region.

news.title: Meet a Mizzou involvement ambassador
news.summary_en: As an involvement ambassador, Catelynn Liniger empowers students to find their place, build meaningful connections and make the most of their Mizzou experience.
